summary: Iteration 3 testing completed successfully. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Login page with Google OAuth button, Dashboard with all stats (Total Members 201, Active Groups 20, MTD Giving $84,250, YTD Giving $236,303), Live Worship Service banner with Join Now and Schedule Visit buttons, Stewardship/Giving page with 6 payment channels (Card/ACH Active, PayPal/Venmo/Zelle/Crypto Pending, Wire Transfer Contact), sidebar navigation with blue active state, user profile display, and logout functionality.

issues: React hydration warnings for table tbody/span - cosmetic React rendering issue, not affecting functionality
Console warnings about chart dimensions on initial render - charts display correctly after data loads

seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data (201 members, 20 groups, 80 households). Test session created/refreshed for testing.
